description.ko: 단단한 모놀리스가 디지털 글리치 풍경으로 산산조각 나는, 제어된 혼돈과 기하학적 파괴를 다룬 연구입니다.
description.en: A study of controlled chaos and geometric destruction, where a solid monolith shatters into a digital glitch landscape.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Kinetic Singularity.' A monolithic #1A1A1A obsidian sphere suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF void, captured at the exact moment of a controlled geometric fragmentation. The core erupts into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slicing through the composition. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing mathematical chaos in frozen motion.
